arm_grant_air_cas_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_cas
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = early_bombs
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_piercing_bombs }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = iw_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = iw_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_airframe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_seaplane1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_seaplane1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = bba_ww1_seaplane1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = bba_naval_bomber1 }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_naval_bomber1

    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_naval_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        add_technology = naval_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_naval_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = tactical_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_tactical_bomber3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_tech = jet_engines
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_tech = jet_engines
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_jet_tactical_bomber1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_jet_tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}








arm_grant_air_transport_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

        }
        add_technology = basic_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        add_technology = improved_fire_control_system
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_medicine1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_medicine1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        add_technology = advanced_machine_tools
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = concentrated_industry3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = atomic_research
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_reactor
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nukes }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = nukes
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = thermonuclear_bombs }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = thermonuclear_bombs
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}








arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = radio_detection }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = radio_detection
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = cavity_magnatron }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar

        add_technology = improved_cavity_magnatron

            NOT = { has_tech = centimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = centimetric_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = phased_array }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = phased_array
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = monopulse_radar }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        add_technology = monopulse_radar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

















arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorized_rocket_unit }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = motorized_rocket_unit
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_guidance }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = advanced_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}











arm_grant_land_anti_air_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_1915 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_1915
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_1918 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_1918
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_1922 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_1922
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_1915
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank_1918 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        add_technology = antitank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank5 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        add_technology = antitank5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

arm_grant_land_artillery_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_field_gun1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = light_field_gun1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_field_gun1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = heavy_field_gun1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_bertha1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_bertha1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_bertha4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_artillery1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_artillery1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_artillery4 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_field_gun2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = heavy_field_gun2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_field_gun2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_tech = tank_unlocker2
        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_tech = gwtank__nostepback
            has_tech = tank_unlocker2__nostepback
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_tank2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_tank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_art }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_spaa }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

arm_grant_land_infantry_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_binoculars }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_binoculars
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_ambulance1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_ambulance1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1infantry_weapons1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1infantry_weapons1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_grenade }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank__nostepback }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1913 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_2__nostepback }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1913 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks

arm_grant_land_mechanised_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = modern_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_art }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = modern_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_spaa }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = modern_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}




arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_great_war = {

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}









arm_grant_land_motorised_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_motorised }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = early_motorised
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_suspension1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1919 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_suspension1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_suspension2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1921 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_suspension2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_suspension3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1927 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_suspension3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry2

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tank_unlocker2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = tank_unlocker2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tank_unlocker2__nostepback }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = tank_unlocker2__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_naval_battleships_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_battleship0_mtg }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_battleship0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_navalmodule_1890_mtg }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = heavy_navalmodule_1890_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_battleship0 }

            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_battleship_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship2_mtg }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship2_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_battleship }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = advanced_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship2

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_cruiser0_mtg }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_cruiser0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser_mtg }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

arm_grant_naval_submarines_great_war = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_submarine0_mtg }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_submarine0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_submarine0 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = ww1_submarine0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_submarine1_mtg }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
